CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, age UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25), (3, 'Charlie', 35);
SELECT id, REPLACE(name, 'Alice', 'Alicia') AS name_replaced FROM test_table;
SELECT id, REPLACE(age, 30, 31) AS age_replaced FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, REPLACE(name, 'Bob', 'Robert') AS name_replaced, REPLACE(age, 25, 26) AS age_replaced FROM test_table WHERE age > 20;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, country String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT t.id, REPLACE(t.name, 'Charlie', 'Charles') AS name_replaced, a.country FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.id;
SELECT REPLACE(name, 'Bob', 'Robert') AS name_replaced FROM (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE age < 35) AS subquery;
SELECT id, REPLACE(name, 'Alice', 'Alicia') AS name_replaced FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table) AS t WHERE age > 20;
SELECT id, REPLACE(name, 'Charlie', 'Charles') AS name_replaced FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table) as inner_query) as outer_query;
